basics.name: Saurav Sagar
basics.title: Operations Executive — Supply Chain & Logistics Operations
basics.summary: Operations and Supply Chain professional experienced in logistics execution, vendor coordination, and data-driven process improvement. Skilled in Power BI, SQL, and advanced Excel to analyse operational performance, optimise capacity utilisation, and support operational decision-making. Currently pursuing PGDM in Operations Management & Data Analytics.

experience.company: OM Logistics Supply Chain Pvt. Ltd.
bullets: Tracked daily operations and shipment movements of 50+ vehicles, ensuring 92% alignment between planned schedules and actual execution.
Conducted variance analysis on manpower utilisation, trip hours, and load planning, driving an 18% improvement in operational efficiency.
Coordinated with 20+ transport partners and warehouse teams to resolve logistics bottlenecks, improving SLA adherence from 83% to 95%.
Led root cause analysis of delivery delays and execution mismatches, reducing average delivery delays by 2 days.

projects.title: Logistics Performance Dashboard – Delhivery Operations Analysis
bullets: Developed a Power BI dashboard analysing logistics performance metrics including shipment flow and operational KPIs.
Performed correlation analysis between planned vs actual delivery metrics to identify execution gaps.

education.institution: G L Bajaj Institute of Management & Research

education.degree: Bachelor of Commerce — Accounting & Business Management
